title: App Store Connect — Brotein Premium subscription order (Monthly first, then Yearly)
html:
App Store Connect subscription-group ordering UI for Brotein Premium. Two tiers in descending service order: (1) brotein_premium_monthly — 1 month — Missing Metadata, (2) brotein_yearly_premium — 1 year — Missing Metadata. Apple's reminder: order determines upgrade/downgrade options shown to the user. Localization step is next.

TL;DR

  • Brotein Premium subscription group contains Monthly (order 1) + Yearly (order 2) — Apple expects highest-service first, but Yahir's ordering makes upgrade-from-Monthly-to-Yearly the default.
  • Both tiers stuck on Missing Metadata — pricing + localization still TODO.
  • Same-day successor to the "already used reference name" error — Yahir resolved by editing the existing IAPs instead of recreating.

brotein · app store connect · revenuecat

related.label: App Store Connect — Brotein Premium subscription setup (Missing Metadata)
